headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Tyler Technologies, Raises Price Target to $420
summary: Barclays  analyst Saket Kalia   maintains Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $410 to $420.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Neutral on Tyler Technologies, Raises Price Target to $360
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Matthew Vanvliet   maintains Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $325 to $360.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Tyler Technologies, Raises Price Target to $375
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Kirk Materne   maintains Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $350 to $375.
